description: Sign a message with a Tier 1 (custodial) wallet. Requires an active consent grant from the authenticated user to the requesting dApp origin.

walletAddress.description: Address to sign with; must be owned by the caller and at Tier 1.

dappOrigin.description: Full origin URL of the requesting dApp. Falls back to the X-dApp-Origin header if omitted.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing required fields or oversize message.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana.

errors.name: WalletNotFound
errors.description: No such wallet for this DID.

errors.name: WalletInactive
errors.description: Wallet has been exported or superseded.

errors.name: UnsupportedTier
errors.description: Wallet is not Tier 1 — must sign client-side or via external wallet software.

errors.name: ConsentRequired
errors.description: No active consent grant authorizes this dApp to sign with this wallet.
